docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CHAMBERS WAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBSON DONNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION JUDGMENT SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAMBERS WAYNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBSON DONNA $92.50 PRINCIPAL, $37.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $130.00, PLAINTIFF ALLOWED $60 FOR REPAIR AND $20 FOR CLEANING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBSON DONNA
